title: Trump pauses U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz, cites Iran deal progress
summary_full: President Donald Trump said he is pausing "Project Freedom," the U.S. military's bid to guide commercial ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: President Donald Trump said he is pausing "Project Freedom," the U.S. military's bid to guide commercial ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.
